title: Back from Mexico — thrive list (subscription, garage, mobile app)
html:
TL;DR

  • Re-entry todo list scribbled the day Yahir got back from a mexico trip in late August 2019; one of the earliest "build a thing" checklists in the corpus.
  • Five-item self-directive: subscription service, clean garage, programming setup, mobile app, thrive motherfucker — already shows the manifesto style note cadence years before he names the form.
  • Sibling to the CDMX nostalgia note from four days later — same Mexico trip, two different processing modes (consumer-task list vs. emotional letter).
  • The "programming setup" line is the earliest extant Yahir reference to a personal coding environment — pre-dates m1 mac, xcode, swiftui entries by years; teen-era seed of the stealth-apps pattern.
  • "Thrive motherfucker" is the first occurrence of the max effort commit verbal kicker that recurs across his late-night entries.

Notes

The 16-year-old just got back from mexico — likely the family / CDMX trip referenced four days later — and the first thing his brain does is convert the post-vacation lift into a five-item make-list: a subscription service (no specifics, idea-shaped), clean the garage, programming setup, mobile app, and the verbal kicker "thrive motherfucker." The sequence reveals the operating model already in place: physical-environment cleanup (GP garage) + tooling (programming setup) + product ambition (subscription, app) all stacked under one declarative mood-line.

The subscription service and mobile app are speculative in 2019 but rhyme with the eventual bromenu / rankett pattern of recurring-revenue + product-distribution. The garage line is the mom house by the river precursor — the house exists, the garage is the thing he can act on. Thrive motherfucker does the max effort commit work: a single verbal stamp that converts a list of tasks into a stance.

Privacy note

The raw note's title contains a slur Yahir uses self-referentially in 2019 teen-voice — preserved verbatim in raw/ per the immutable-record rule, redacted in this summary's title.

Connections

  • 2019 09 04 regresarias a la cdmx — same-trip emotional sibling
  • 2019 08 25 excitement for opportunities · 2019 08 26 dream of dads key — same week
  • mexico · grants pass teen era
  • max effort commit
  • mom house by the river — garage-as-act
